prediction.reasoning: ELV (Elevance Health Inc.) has been trading in a relatively tight range recently, showing slight upward momentum from its earlier May lows, following a period of consolidation. The current price of $328.49 reflects this trend. Our point estimate of $329.50 suggests a modest appreciation over the next 7 days, aligning with this slight positive bias. The confidence intervals are derived using a Geometric Brownian Motion model, incorporating an estimated annualized daily drift of 5% and an annualized volatility of 22%. This volatility is reflective of ELV's historical price fluctuations as a large-cap healthcare stock. While the stock has shown resilience, significant price movements are not anticipated in such a short timeframe, hence the relatively narrow range of the 50% CI and broader ranges for the 80% and 90% CIs.
